description: SaT (Segment any Text / wtpsplit) ML sentence segmenter — runs XLM-RoBERTa SaT ONNX models in a Mode-C daemon and answers the segmentation Segment RPC.
author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>

segmenters.name: sat
segmenters.description: wtpsplit Segment-any-Text ML model. Best for noisy, unpunctuated, or mixed-script multilingual text.
